text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho is pleased to hear that I get excited
when I see her run because it feels like something
new is about to begin.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She says she feels the same way when she sees her
grandma casting magic. In other words, she knows
now that she's successfully cast her racing magic
on me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She knows that by running in the Oka Sho—a very
special race—her magic will get stronger, and she
might even finish the spell altogether. Feeling
hopeful, she heads for the paddock.
